data.title: Strategy's preferred stock STRK has risen 3% since the beginning of February, with lower volatility than MSTR and Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Strike (STRK), the preferred stock issued by Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), has been listed for just over a month, and its current share price has risen by 3% compared to when it was listed on February 5. Strategy's common stock has fallen by 20% during the same period, and its volatility was previously lower than that of MicroStrategy and Bitcoin. Analysts believe that preferred stocks such as STRK can be seen as a hybrid of equity and debt. If the company pays dividends, the holders have a greater right to receive dividends than common stock holders, and if the company goes bankrupt and liquidates, the holders also have the right to obtain company assets. (Coindesk)

data.title: CBOE Submits XRP ETF Application for Franklin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) has submitted an XRP ETF application for Franklin. It is reported that Cboe BZX, a subsidiary of the Chicago Board Options Exchange Group, has submitted a proposed rule change (19b-4 application document) to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Greeks.live: Ethereum still has the potential to rebound, and traders are paying attention to the key support level near $1,900
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released an English community briefing, which revealed that despite the positive CPI data (2.8%, expected 2.9%), the group is generally bearish on the short-term market outlook. Traders are watching Ethereum's key support level near $1,900 and discussing the possible bottom of Bitcoin, with some suggesting that the $60,000 level could be a downside target. The market quickly gave up the gains brought by the good CPI data, and traders pointed out that "there are no more positive factors for Americans." Ethereum was described as "stressed garbage" and had the potential to rebound despite the overall negative sentiment.

data.title: Market Sentiment Turns Bearish Despite Positive CPI Data
data.description: According to Odaily, Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, shared insights in an English community briefing, revealing a bearish sentiment among traders despite positive Consumer Price Index (CPI) data showing a 2.8% increase, slightly below the expected 2.9%. Traders are closely monitoring Ethereum's critical support level around $1,900 and discussing Bitcoin's potential bottom, with some suggesting a downward target of $60,000. The market quickly reversed the gains from the favorable CPI data, with traders expressing that there are no positive factors left for Americans. Ethereum was described as 'under immense pressure,' yet there remains potential for a rebound despite the overall negative sentiment.

data.title: U.S. Senate to Vote on Stablecoin Innovation Act
data.description:
According to Odaily, the U.S. Senate is scheduled to vote on the Guiding and Establishing New Innovations for U.S. Stablecoins (GENIUS) Act this Thursday. This comprehensive stablecoin legislation has garnered both criticism and support, with proponents suggesting it will grant federal recognition to the burgeoning industry and facilitate the broader adoption of stablecoins as a payment method beyond cryptocurrency exchanges.

Massachusetts Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren has expressed her intention to unite Senate Democrats in opposition to the measure. She warns that the act could pave the way for large tech companies to dominate the U.S. dollar. In a two-page analysis of the bill, Warren stated, "Under this legislation, Elon Musk could launch 'X Money' tomorrow, transforming social media into a payment empire with minimal regulation, which poses a risk of the dollar's potential privatization."

data.title: Market news publisher @tier10k: 2FA/Yubikey are both enabled but still attacked, details of the incident will be released later
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market news publisher @tier10k posted on the X platform that his X account was obviously hacked. Don't believe any news for the time being. It is still unclear what happened because his 2FA/Yubikey were enabled but still attacked. Details will be released later. @tier10k also said that there was no application connected, no content in the access history/session, no delegated account, and no API key leak.

data.title: Planet Evening News
Bloomberg analysts predict the odds of altcoin ETFs being approved: 90% for LTC, 70% for SOL, and 65% for XRP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has postponed its decision on whether to approve applications for exchange-traded funds (ETFs) backed by several altcoins, including XRP, Solana, Litecoin, and Dogecoin, as well as a new Ethereum ETF proposal that allows issuers to pledge their holdings and distribute part of the proceeds to investors. Bloomberg ETF analysts James Seyffart and Eric Balchunas gave a prediction for the approval of altcoin ETFs: the probability of Litecoin ETF approval is 90%, Solana ETF is 70%, Dogecoin ETF is 75%, and XRP ETF is 65%. (Bitcoinist)

data.title: US Senator Warren: If the stablecoin bill is passed, Musk can immediately launch X currency and build a payment empire
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Senate is scheduled to vote on the Guidance and Establishment of U.S. Stablecoin Innovation Act (GENIUS Act) on Thursday. This is a comprehensive stablecoin bill that critics and supporters say will allow the federal government to recognize this emerging industry and pave the way for stablecoins to be more widely adopted as a means of payment outside of the cryptocurrency trading field. Massachusetts Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren said she hopes to unite Senate Democrats to oppose the measure and warned that it would open the door for large technology companies to take over the dollar. She said in a two-page analysis of the bill: "Under this bill, Elon Musk can launch 'X Money' tomorrow and turn social media into a payment empire with almost no regulation. What we see is the potential privatization of the dollar." (Fortune)

data.title: D-Wave Quantum Inc. Sees Record Bookings Surge by 502% in Q4 2024
data.description:
D-Wave Quantum Inc. reported a 21% decrease in revenue to $2.3 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, yet achieved a record bookings increase of 502% to $18.3 million.
The post D-Wave Quantum Inc. Sees Record Bookings Surge by 502% in Q4 2024 appeared first on Tokenist.
